---
title: 'lab 8'
author: 'erin yang'
format:
    dashboard: 
        orientation: columns
embed-resources: True
---

## Column {width = 30%}

Research Question: How has air quality changed over time?

### Row {height = 40%}

```{r}
#| title: Table of Air Quality Data

head(airquality)
```

### Row

```{r}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: Highest Recorded Ozone
list(
  icon = "stopwatch",
  color = "primary",
  value = max(airquality$Ozone, na.rm = TRUE)
)
```

## Column

```{r}
#| title: Graph of Average Ozone per Month

plot(airquality)
```

### row under

Summary

So basically as we can see theres like a lot of data and theres some corrlation for some of them, such as ozone and wind, ozone and temp, and temp and wind.
